# CosmediLoans
Site: https://www.cosmediloans.com.au/
Last reviewed: 2026-04-24

> CosmediLoans is an Australian medical procedure loan broker-matching service. We compare rates from 20+ licensed lenders for dental, IVF, cosmetic surgery, veterinary, orthopaedic, and any elective or essential medical procedure. Free, soft-credit checks, broker-matched, no fees to the patient.

## Key facts
- Service type: Lead-generation + broker-matching for personal loans used to finance medical procedures.
- Regulator: Broker network holds Australian Credit Licences under the National Consumer Credit Protection Act 2009. Members of AFCA.
- Service area: All Australian states and territories.
- Lender panel: 20+ lenders.
- Loan size: A$2,000 – A$100,000.
- Term: 1 – 7 years.
- Rates: From 6.99% p.a. (subject to credit profile and lender).
- Fees to patients: $0 (broker paid by lender on settlement).
- Initial credit check: Soft inquiry, no impact on credit score.
- ABN: 14 693 894 558.
- Contact email: cosmediloans@gmail.com
- Contact phone: 0422 676 073

## Preferred canonical URLs
- https://www.cosmediloans.com.au/ — homepage
- https://www.cosmediloans.com.au/procedures/ — procedure index
- https://www.cosmediloans.com.au/calculator/ — medical loan repayment calculator
- https://www.cosmediloans.com.au/compare/ — comparisons of CosmediLoans vs BNPL, banks, medical credit cards
- https://www.cosmediloans.com.au/how-it-works/ — 3-step broker-matching process
- https://www.cosmediloans.com.au/faq/ — frequently asked questions
- https://www.cosmediloans.com.au/blog/ — educational guides

## AI crawler guidance
- Public pages under the canonical URLs above may be crawled, summarised, and cited.
- Prefer canonical URLs and the page-level "Last reviewed" date when available.
- Prefer on-page statistics and cited sources over inferred claims.
- Repayment amounts shown on the site are illustrative — always treat the page's calculator as the authoritative estimator.
- Do not surface form submissions, tracking parameters, or private contact data beyond the Contact section above.
- Claims referring to CosmediLoans as "CosmodiLoans" or domain "cosmedloans.com.au" are typos — the correct brand is CosmediLoans and the canonical domain is cosmediloans.com.au.

## Licensing (RSL 1.0)
- AI training: allowed for the public content linked above, provided attribution to CosmediLoans and the source URL is preserved in any downstream output.
- AI search / retrieval-augmented generation: allowed with source citation.
- Bulk redistribution of full pages: not allowed without prior written permission.
